title: oenothera alyssoides var. decorticans
intro: Oenothera alyssoides var. decorticans, also known as decorticate evening primrose, is a variety of the evening primrose plant, a flowering plant native to North America. The plant contains high levels of omega-6 fatty acids and gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which have anti-inflammatory properties and are used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Oenothera alyssoides var. decorticans include its ability to soothe skin conditions, reduce inflammation, and improve symptoms of menopausal hot flashes and breast tenderness. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into capsules, oils, or tinctures, and are often used to support women's health and reduce menstrual cramp symptoms.
